title: fumaria flabellata
intro: Fumaria flabellata, also known as umbrella fumitory, is a flowering plant species within the fumitory family (Fumariaceae). This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of inflammation and skin conditions, due to its alkaloid content. The health benefits of Fumaria flabellata include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, Fumaria flabellata is often used to make teas and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
